one_liner: Netlify offers a broad, self-serve REST API (OAuth2/PAT auth) for managing sites, deploys, and infra, with an official MCP server already available for AI agent integration.

auth_methods.notes: Full OAuth2 flow via https://app.netlify.com/authorize for public/third-party integrations.
Personal access tokens (PATs) generated in user settings, used as Bearer token for manual/direct API access; self-serve, no credit card required.

self_serve_notes: Free tier includes API access with 300 credits/month, no credit card required. PATs can be generated instantly from user account settings.

api_surface.notes: Extensive REST API covering sites, deploys, builds, DNS, env vars, functions, database, webhooks, etc. OpenAPI spec published with Go and JS client libraries.

evidence.supports: OAuth2 and PAT authentication details, self-serve token generation, REST API base URL and usage.
Broad REST API surface covering sites, deploys, DNS, env vars, functions, database, webhooks, etc.
Self-serve free tier pricing with API access included, no credit card required.
Credit-based free plan details enabling self-serve API usage.
